with the month (e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December).The variable also indicates 
whether the beneficiary’s state of residence paid his/her monthly premium for Part B coverage (and 
Part A if necessary). State Medicaid programs can pay those premiums for certain dual eligibles; this 
action is called “buying in” and so this variable is the “buy-in code.” ^ Back to TOC ^
